conclusion: User prefers value-over-cheapest in most categories
User becomes highly research-heavy in electronics — compares 3+ items before buying
User avoids products with fewer than 50 reviews
User prefers refundable items, especially in electronics
User trusts ratings over brand name in categories under $100
User rarely impulse-buys; typically shortlists before adding to cart
User is willing to pay a moderate premium for reliability but not luxury branding alone
User avoids unknown sellers even when the product looks appealing
